description: Random row-wise validation materially overestimates performance for unseen publications.
evidence: Both continuous outcomes had positive grouped-minus-random MAE gaps; all Step 17 sensitivity scenarios retained the same direction; both classification outcomes had positive random-minus-grouped balanced-accuracy gaps.

description: The random-intercept correction can help represented sources but does not solve transfer to unseen sources.
evidence: At least one random-rowwise conditional-vs-matched contrast favored conditional prediction, while grouped conditional and marginal predictions were identical.

description: Cross-publication behavior differs between cell viability and filament diameter.
evidence: Grouped tuned-RF R2 was approximately null for cell viability and remained positive for filament diameter.
